domain: YouTube creator growth and strategy: recommendation and discovery, retention and average view duration, packaging, Shorts, monetization, analytics, cadence, and community
raw_input_types: Operator notes and deep-research reports filed to .raw/

input_schemas.description: Sanitized YouTube Studio video-level export (no credentials or private audience data)

importers.description: Validate and normalize an export, deriving average percentage viewed and RPM

synthesis_modules.description: Aggregate views, watch hours, CTR, APV, blended RPM, and sourced flags
Flag long-form videos with reach but below-median CTR as A/B test candidates

report_renderers.description: Render a sourced markdown scorecard with concept wikilinks and a rollback note

fixtures.description: Sanitized 5-video sample export (fake IDs, no PII or real earnings)
Sample raw research source for the generic ingestion pipeline

tests.description: Importer, synthesis, renderer determinism, and malformed-input tests
End-to-end scaffold, ingest, synthesize, render, demo, package, and install tests
